output: Executed batch 1 task T1 in `AgentChat.tsx`. Added `QueuedMessage` and hardened `OptimisticMessage` types, introduced queue state scaffolding, added `createMessageId()` with `crypto.randomUUID()` fallback, verified `AgentTurn.timestamp` is an ISO string and now parse it before optimistic-clear comparison, and rewrote the optimistic-clear effect so it only clears after turn-count growth plus matching text and timestamp. I also confirmed the later gating/cleanup touchpoints for follow-up batches at the new-session, cancel, input-disabled, and send-disabled paths. Verification: `npm test -- AgentChat` is currently failing for a pre-existing Router issue in `AgentChat.test.tsx`; `npx eslint src/tools/video-editor/components/AgentChat/AgentChat.tsx` passes; repo-wide `npx tsc -p tsconfig.app.json --noEmit` reports many unrelated pre-existing errors outside this feature area. Checkpoint written to `reigh-app/.megaplan/plans/add-a-message-queue-to-the-20260414-1343/execution_batch_1.json`.
deviations: `npm test -- AgentChat` is not green in the current baseline: `AgentChat.test.tsx` renders `AgentChat` without a Router, so `useLocation()` throws before test assertions. This appears unrelated to T1 and was not fixed in this batch.
Repo-wide `npx tsc -p tsconfig.app.json --noEmit` reports many unrelated pre-existing TypeScript errors outside `AgentChat`; no broader cleanup was attempted in this batch.

task_updates.executor_notes: Added `QueuedMessage` and hardened `OptimisticMessage` in `reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/components/AgentChat/AgentChat.tsx`, including `id`, `text`, `attachments`, `sentAtMs`, and `priorTurnCount`. Verified `AgentTurn.timestamp` is typed as an ISO string in `reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/types/agent-session.ts`, added `getTurnTimestampMs()` plus `createMessageId()` with `crypto.randomUUID()`/fallback, and rewrote the optimistic-clear effect so it only clears after turn-count growth beyond `priorTurnCount` and a matching later user turn whose parsed timestamp is `>= sentAtMs - 1000`. Confirmed the later gating/cleanup touchpoints remain at the new-session, cancel, input-disabled, and send-disabled sites for follow-up tasks. Verification: `npm test -- AgentChat` still fails due to the pre-existing Router issue in `AgentChat.test.tsx`; `npx eslint src/tools/video-editor/components/AgentChat/AgentChat.tsx` passes; repo-wide `npx tsc -p tsconfig.app.json --noEmit` shows unrelated pre-existing errors outside this feature area.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Yes. `OptimisticMessage` now includes `id`, `text`, `attachments`, `sentAtMs`, and `priorTurnCount`, and the clear effect now requires turn-count growth plus content match plus parsed timestamp comparison rather than text-only matching.
